items.title: Fuel surcharges jump as airlines tighten schedules
items.desc: Local airlines have continued to reduce capacity by consolidating less profitable flights into remaining services to stay afloat amid rising jet fuel prices, while Japan Airlines and ANA announced a doubling of fuel surcharges, with Thailand-bound fuel surcharges increasing from about 3,000 baht to 6,000 baht.

items.title: Industrial land prices flat as Chinese investors sell up
items.desc: Despite strong demand, average asking prices for industrial land are expected to remain flat due to an influx of land from Chinese investors unable to lease or operate businesses on their plots, according to property consultancy Cushman & Wakefield Thailand.

items.title: Plastic supply dubbed stable
items.desc: Supplies of plastic pellets and plastic packaging are sufficient and expected to last until at least July, according to plastic pellet manufacturers, distributors, and industrial users.

items.title: BLS sees strong Q1 results for listed firms
items.desc: Listed Thai companies are on track to deliver strong first-quarter financial results, with net profits projected to rise 15% year-on-year and 26% quarter-on-quarter, underpinned by sector-specific tailwinds, says Bualuang Securities (BLS).

items.title: PM mulls B500bn loan bid
items.desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has instructed his deputy Ekniti Nitithanprapas and the Council of State to study the legal implications of issuing an emergency loan decree and expanding the country's public debt ceiling.

items.title: Wary response to borrowing plan
items.desc: The government is preparing to issue an emergency decree to borrow 500 billion baht and raise the public debt ceiling, according to a news report on Monday.

items.title: Flyover to close until February
items.desc: The busy Pratunam flyover on Phetchaburi Road will close from Friday at 10pm until next February to allow for the construction of an underground section of the Orange Line MRT, according to the Metropolitan Police Bureau (MPB) and the Mass Rapid Transit Authority of Thailand (MRTA).

items.title: Gasoline users left out of fuel price cut
items.desc: Fuel pricing policy is again under scrutiny as critics urge the government to extend benefits from falling global crude oil prices to gasoline and gasohol consumers, who they argue are disproportionately burdened by contributions to the Oil Fuel Fund.

items.title: Luxurious 1-Bedroom Condo for Rent – Laguna/Bangtao, Phuket
items.desc: Sea & Lake View High-floor condo with beautiful sea and lagoon views, located in the prestigious Laguna district – one of Phuket’s best areas for lifestyle, beach access, and restaurants. Price: 55,000 THB / month (yearly contract)* Property Details • 60 sqm • High floor • Fully furnished • Spacious living area with balcony • 1 bedroom / 1 bathroom • Modern interior design • Western kitchen • Washing machine • High-speed internet Condo Facilities • Rooftop infinity pool with panoramic views • Gym and sundeck • Additional ground pool • 24/7 security & CCTV • Covered parking • Elevators

items.title: Hospital and airline tycoon Prasert dies at 93
items.desc: Dr Prasert Prasarttong-Osoth, the founder of Thailand’s largest private hospital business as well as an airline that put Koh Samui on the global tourism map, has passed away at the age of 93.

items.title: Court rejects 500,000 baht bail, sends officer to jail in fatal Pattaya shooting
items.desc: The accused police officer, known as “Inspector Joe the Gunman,” is seen being transferred in a prison transport truck to Pattaya Special Prison after the court denied bail in a fatal Walking Street shooting case. PATTAYA, Thailand – A police officer known as “Inspector Joe the Gunman” has been sent to jail after the Pattaya Provincial Court rejected his bail request in a fatal shooting case on Walking Street. Pol Sub-Lt Jirasak Srikatthanam, 54, a member of the Pattaya City Police investigation unit, is accused of fatally shooting a 41-year-old cannabis shop owner, Pattarathon Jirachokchaikul

items.title: Pattaya launches massive free health screening drive for seniors ahead of April 30 event
items.desc: Deputy Mayor Wuthisak Rermkijakarn chairs the planning meeting as Pattaya prepares a large-scale free health screening program for seniors, aimed at expanding preventive healthcare and improving quality of life for elderly residents. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya City is preparing to roll out a large-scale free health screening initiative for older residents as part of its “Healthy Living” program 2026, aiming to strengthen preventive healthcare and improve quality of life for the elderly. The preparations were chaired by Deputy Mayor Wuthisak Rermkijakarn, who presided over a planning meeting a

items.title: Irish man allegedly sets Pattaya condo room on fire during hallucination scare, three rescued
items.desc: Firefighters and rescue teams evacuate residents and rescue three people after an Irish man allegedly set fire to a condominium room in central Pattaya during an apparent hallucination episode early on April 21. PATTAYA, Thailand – An Irish man allegedly set fire to a condominium room in central Pattaya during an apparent hallucination episode early Tuesday morning, April 21, forcing emergency crews to rescue three people trapped inside the smoke-filled building. Police, firefighters, and rescue teams were called to a condominium on Central Pattaya Soi 4 at around 3:46 a.m. after reports of a

items.title: City pushes health upgrade drive with Pattaya Rak Center partnership
items.desc: Mayor Poramet Ngampichet led discussions with the Pattaya Rak preventive medicine center to strengthen healthcare services for residents and tourists, supporting efforts to enhance travel health services, vaccinations, and disease screening across the city. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya City is moving to enhance its public health services through closer cooperation with the Pattaya Rak Center, a preventive medicine unit under the Department of Disease Control, Ministry of Public Health, aimed at improving healthcare access for both residents and tourists. Mayor Poramet Ngampichet on Tuesday, Apr

items.title: Songkran revelry at Bang Saray Beach draws backlash over inappropriate public dancing
items.desc: Crowds at Bang Saray Beach Songkran celebrations reacted with criticism after revelers were seen dancing provocatively and exposing themselves in public, sparking concerns over tourism image and public decency. PATTAYA, Thailand – Songkran celebrations along Bang Saray Beach in Sattahip, around 20 minutes south of Pattaya, turned controversial after videos and images emerged showing young partygoers engaging in inappropriate dancing and revealing behavior in public on April 20. The beach road area was crowded with both Thai and foreign tourists enjoying water fights and festivities throughout

items.title: Drunk foreigner injured after falling from height near Pattaya’s Pratumnak Pier
items.desc: Jomtien municipal officers found an intoxicated foreign man with head injuries and abrasions after he reportedly fell from a height near a pier on Pratumnak Soi 5. PATTAYA, Thailand – A foreign man was injured after falling from a height near a pier in the Pratumnak area late Tuesday night, April 21, prompting a response from municipal officers and rescue workers. Jomtien municipal officers received reports from local residents of an intoxicated foreign man who had fallen near the Ziggy Pier area on Pratumnak Road Soi 5. Officers arrived at the scene and found the man with a head wound and min

items.title: Foreign tourists injured in jet ski collision off Pattaya Beach
items.desc: Pattaya municipal officers and lifeguards rushed to assist after two jet skis collided off Pattaya Beach, leaving foreign tourists injured and requiring ambulance transport to hospital. PATTAYA, Thailand – Several foreign tourists were injured after two jet skis collided off Pattaya Beach on Tuesday, April 21, prompting a rapid emergency response from local authorities and rescue teams. The incident occurred along Pattaya Beach, where municipal enforcement officers and lifeguards were called to assist after reports of a jet ski crash involving foreign visitors. Pattaya municipal officers quick

items.title: Emergency response activated after report of missing child near Pattaya shopping mall
items.desc: Pattaya municipal officers safely assisted a 5-year-old boy known as “Nong Pai” after he was found separated from his parents near Central Pattaya, before transferring him to the Chonburi Child and Family Protection Home under child welfare procedures. PATTAYA, Thailand – Authorities in Pattaya quickly responded to assist a 5-year-old boy who was found separated from his parents near a major shopping mall in the city, ensuring his safety before transferring him to child welfare officials. The incident occurred on April 21 after Pattaya City Radio Center coordinated with Pattaya City Police Sta

items.title: Moody’s upgrades Thailand outlook to ‘stable’
items.desc: Moody’s Ratings on Tuesday upgraded the outlook for the government of Thailand to stable from negative, while affirming the foreign and local currency issuer and local currency senior unsecured credit ratings at Baa1.

items.title: Pattaya beer bars enjoy strong post-Songkran trade
items.desc: Beer bars and nightlife venues across Pattaya are continuing to enjoy strong post-Songkran trade, as many Thai and foreign tourists remain in town for more of what the city has to offer. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya’s beer bars and nightlife businesses are continuing to reap the benefits of a busy Songkran holiday period, with many venues reporting strong trade in the days following the festival as Thai and foreign tourists remain in the city. From April 12 to 19, entertainment venues, beer bars, restaurants, and related tourism businesses saw heavy foot traffic as vi

items.title: Thai woman’s Songkran GHB exposure claim investigated as poison centre questions theory
items.desc: Thai woman’s Songkran GHB exposure claim investigated as poison centre questions theory Legacy Ramathibodi Poison Centre said the chances of successfully administering gamma-hydroxybutyrate, or GHB , through a water gun were very low after a Thai woman claimed she may have been exposed to the drug during Songkran celebrations in Bangkok. The woman posted a warning on TikTok on April 13, saying she was hospitalised after being exposed to GHB at an entertainment venue in the capital during Songkran. She said she had not accepted drinks from strangers, her cup had a lid, and her boyfriend d

items.title: 2026年全球生活成本谁最贵？泰国排第几？
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据Visual Capitalist日前发布的《2026年全球生活成本指数》报告显示，该指数基于对全球155个国家和地区的调查，评估指标涵盖日常生活开支与住房租金两大类别。指数的基准设定为美国纽约市（指数=100），因此某地的指数即代表其生活成本相当于纽约的百分之多少。 报告指出，英国海外领地百慕大是全球生活成本最高的地区，其整体生活费用比纽约高出23.5%，生活成本指数达123.5。 分析认为，全球生活成本最高的地区中，相当一部分为岛屿，且多为避税天堂或国际金融中心。例如，美属维尔京群岛与开曼群岛均跻身全球前十。由于财富高度集中，加之对进口商品的高度依赖，这些岛屿的物价与生活成本普遍处于高位。 在亚洲地区，新加坡成为生活成本最高的国家（或城市），全球排名第5，指数为81.2，即其生活成本约为纽约的八成。其主要原因包括土地资源稀缺推高房地产价格，以及对进口商品的高度依赖。 2026年全球生活成本最贵TOP10榜单（生活成本指数，纽约=100）如下： 1. 百慕大 — 123.5   2. 开曼群岛 — 97.9   3. 瑞士 — 84.3   4. 美属维尔京群岛 — 82.5   5. 新加坡 — 81.2   6. 巴哈马 — 77.1   7. 冰岛 — 75.9   8. 泽西岛 —

items.title: 菲律宾总统邀阿努廷出席东盟峰会，肯定泰国反诈成绩
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月21日13时30分，泰国总理阿努廷在总理办公室，与菲律宾总统费迪南德·罗慕尔德兹·马科斯举行电话会谈。会后，泰国总理府发言人拉查妲向媒体介绍了会谈主要内容。 马科斯总统首先对阿努廷再次就任泰国总理表示祝贺，认为这充分体现了泰国民众对其执政能力的高度信任。马科斯同时正式邀请阿努廷出席将于5月由菲律宾主办的第四十八届东盟峰会。 阿努廷对此表示感谢，并确认将出席会议。他表示，泰方将全力支持菲律宾作为东盟轮值主席国开展的各项工作，相信泰菲两国合作将不断深化。在当前全球局势复杂多变的背景下，经济领域的合作尤为重要。阿努廷还预计，本届东盟峰会将重点讨论中东局势，以提升东盟在能源安全和粮食安全方面的应对能力。 在通话中，阿努廷提出应将打击跨国犯罪作为区域合作的重点任务。双方一致同意加强在反跨国犯罪领域的合作，特别是针对网络诈骗犯罪的打击行动，并将加快推动相关协议制定。双方承诺，将在双边及东盟框架内积极推进上述合作。 马科斯总统还感谢泰国政府协助近千名受缅甸诈骗集团影响的菲律宾公民经泰国安全返回本国。 阿努廷在会谈中强调：“泰国与菲律宾作为东盟成员国，拥有紧密的双边关系，未来有潜力发展为更深层次的战略伙伴。双方将携手推动经济、安全及可持续发展等各领域合作，为两国人民带来福祉，并增强整个东盟地区的整体实力。” （编译：WAN；来源：thestandardth） The post

items.title: Woman catches, punches peeping tom filming in Surat Thani toilet
items.desc: Woman catches, punches peeping tom filming in Surat Thani toilet Legacy A woman punched a man after catching him filming her inside a toilet at a petrol station in Surat Thani on April 16, before police were called . The incident took place at a petrol station in Baan Na Doem district after a group of women were returning from Songkran celebrations and heading back to Khian Sa district. They stopped at the station to use the toilets and the convenience store. Prae, a 27 year old woman wearing a black shirt, said she noticed a mobile phone protruding from the next stall while she was in the toi

items.title: Japanese chef closes ramen shop after online fame reveals permit issue
items.desc: Japanese chef closes ramen shop after online fame reveals permit issue Legacy A Japanese chef temporarily closed his ramen shop in Samut Prakan after a work permit issue came to light following the shop’s rise to fame on Thai social media. The story began when a Thai woman posted a review in the Facebook group Ramen Lover Association of Thailand about a shop called Kham Sanya Kub Moo Tua Nan, or The Promise to the Pig. She wrote that she found the shop by chance on Google Maps and was impressed by it. According to her post, the ramen shop was located at the Bangchak petrol station branch on Sr

items.title: Frigate deal puts Thai Navy on path to shipbuilding self-reliance
items.desc: Frigate deal puts Thai Navy on path to shipbuilding self-reliance Legacy The Royal Thai Navy held a meeting with the Thai Shipbuilding and Repairing Association (TSBA) and domestic shipyard operators yesterday, April 20, to discuss the offset policy framework for its planned frigate procurement . Rear Admiral Parach Rattanachaiyaphan said the National Science and Technology Development Agency (NSTDA) also participated in the meeting to clarify the principles and calculation methods used under the offset framework to ensure all parties share a common understanding. The project involves the proc

items.title: Thai AirAsia X flight changes leave travellers scrambling
items.desc: Thai AirAsia X flight changes leave travellers scrambling Legacy Thai passengers have complained online after Thai AirAsia X (AA X) changed several Japan-bound flights and issued flight cancellations , particularly on the Don Mueang to Osaka route , disrupting travel plans in May. The issue gained attention in online Japan travel groups, where multiple passengers shared accounts of sudden flight changes with no prior email or SMS notification. One passenger wrote, “I booked AA for May 16 to 20, and my outbound flight was moved from the 16th to the 18th, but the return flight has not been chang

items.title: Row with boyfriend leads Thai woman to step into oncoming traffic
items.desc: Row with boyfriend leads Thai woman to step into oncoming traffic Legacy A woman came under criticism from Thai social media users after she was seen walking in the middle of a road in Chachoengsao at around midnight on Saturday, April 18, allegedly following an argument with her boyfriend . The incident was captured on dashcam footage by a passing driver, who posted the clip on TikTok under the account @mutita_kn before later deleting it. The video was subsequently reposted by ThaiRath and several Facebook pages. In the footage, the woman, wearing a white tank top and short jeans, is seen wal

items.title: Foreign creator falls in love with Thailand, moves to Bangkok
items.desc: Foreign creator falls in love with Thailand, moves to Bangkok Legacy A foreign content creator has drawn attention online after announcing she has moved to Bangkok , describing the Thai capital as her dream city as she begins a new chapter in Thailand . Louise, who posts on TikTok under the username @louisesolotravels , revealed on March 26 that she had relocated to what she described as her “dream city,” Bangkok. She previously travelled in Thailand, fell in love with the country , and has now returned to live in the capital. @louisesolotravels My dream is actually coming true now 🥹🌸🏙️ my new

items.title: 泰国警方澄清“水枪投毒”案受害者身份：系泰国籍并非中国公民
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月21日，针对近日网络热议的“宋干节女子疑遭高压水枪投毒”事件，泰国警方于4月20日正式发布澄清声明。声明指出，该事件受害者为泰国籍女性，并非部分网传信息所称的中国公民。 据泰国Makkasan警察局在其官方脸书账号发布消息澄清，涉事女子为泰国人，目前已接受警方询问和相关医疗检查。 Makkasan警察局透露，在调查过程中，这名受害女子向警方陈述，当天她只和朋友们一起玩水、喝酒，她的杯子一直是盖紧的，并没有和朋友以外的人喝过东西，怀疑是玩水时被其他人朝口中喷水所致。 私立医院的医生根据初步症状判断，受害女子可能是摄入了GHB（γ-羟基丁酸），这是一种用于治疗癫痫及帕金森氏症的药物，可镇静、安眠，也具有精神活性作用，然而近几年常被不法分子利用，制作成“神仙水”、“听话水”、“迷奸药”等。受害女子于4月12日凌晨零点至3点接受治疗后已出院，体内的具体物质需等待血液化验报告才能确认。 目前案件仍在调查中，Makkasan警察局已完成的工作如下： 1. 将受害女子送往警察医院接受检查治疗； 2. 调取事发当天周边监控录像； 3. 询问受害女子； 4. 询问周边证人； 接下来，Makkasan警察局将在法医检验出结果后，和医生进一步确认造成受害女子身体不适的原因，以厘清案件真相。 据悉，这名33岁的泰国女子此前曾向Makkasan警察局报案称，4月11日22时许，她与5名

items.title: 王毅将于4月22日至26日应邀访问柬埔寨、泰国、缅甸
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 外交部发言人宣布：中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅将于4月22日至26日应邀访问柬埔寨、泰国、缅甸。访柬期间，王毅将与国防部长董军共同出席中柬外长、防长“2+2”战略对话机制首次会议。 (来源：外交部网站) The post 王毅将于4月22日至26日应邀访问柬埔寨、泰国、缅甸 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: Russian suspect arrested in Phuket over scam cash withdrawals
items.desc: Russian suspect arrested in Phuket over scam cash withdrawals Legacy Police in Phuket arrested a Russian national yesterday, April 20, in connection with a call centre scam after he was found withdrawing funds linked to fraudulent operations . The suspect, identified as 41 year old Anton Kurchenko, was monitored by Phuket Provincial Police after making multiple ATM withdrawals outside a supermarket in Soi Ta-iad, Chalong subdistrict. According to a report from the Phuket Times Facebook page, Kurchenko withdrew cash 16 times, totalling around 331,000 baht. Police said the funds were linked to 1

items.title: Radisson Hotel Chateau de Bangkok opens in Ploen Chit after 30-year legacy
items.desc: Radisson Hotel Chateau de Bangkok opens in Ploen Chit after 30-year legacy Legacy Radisson Hotel Group has opened Radisson Hotel Chateau de Bangkok in Ploen Chit, Bangkok, reviving a property that has stood in Soi Ruamrudee for over 30 years. The hotel offers 178 guest rooms and suites, three dining venues, and event facilities across several dedicated spaces. The relaunched property retains the building’s established three-decade character while updating interiors and modernising amenities throughout. Many rooms offer skyline views, and suites with kitchenettes are available for long-st

items.title: Foreigner claims 0% tax after buying 56 million baht Phuket home
items.desc: Foreigner claims 0% tax after buying 56 million baht Phuket home Legacy A foreign social media user has drawn attention online after claiming to have bought a 56 million baht home in Phuket and could live in Thailand long-term while paying zero tax on global income. The post, shared on X, showed the individual with his partner alongside a message stating they had signed a contract to purchase a “dream home” near Bang Tao Beach for 56 million baht, or £1.3 million. The foreign man described his Phuket home as a freehold property and said the purchase would allow him to qualify for “Wealthy Glob

items.title: 泰国“移动版AI人脸识别”上岗，成功抓获印度逾期男子
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月19日，泰国春武里府旅游警察局第一分局第二支队第四大队调查组在芭提雅展开“万莱节”违法犯罪活动打击行动，旨在提高全国主要旅游景点的安全水平。在本次行动中，警方出动搭载AI人脸识别系统的移动指挥车，在海滩沿岸道路进行巡查，并成功识别出一名35岁的印度籍男子，AI系统显示他已在泰国逾期居留43天。 警方当场控制该名嫌疑人，以“外国人非法入境及签证到期后仍居留”罪将其移送芭提雅警察局依法进一步处理。据悉，在旅游警察局局长萨希拉警中将的指示下，旅游警察积极引进高科技手段预防和打击犯罪，运用AI技术辅助调查，是旅游警察提升安全措施的重要措施之一，在宋干节和芭提雅万莱节等重大节假日期间，为增强游客安全感提供了有效的保障。 （编译：KA；来源：fm91bkk） The post 泰国“移动版AI人脸识别”上岗，成功抓获印度逾期男子 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: 潜心学习中文超2年，泰女星Aokbab首演中国剧女主
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月21日，因主演电影《天才枪手》而被观众熟知的泰国女演员“Aokbab”近日官宣加入由何润东执导中国台湾电视剧《对你心动的预言》，并在剧中挑大梁担任女主角，与两大当红男星陈昊森和曹佑宁合作。据悉，该剧已于2026年4月15日盛大开机，主要讲述女主角“姚可珣”因意外穿越时空后，发现自己陷入“相爱即死亡”的残酷预言，必须在命运与情感间做出抉择的故事。 为了在中国剧集中演好女主角，Aokbab此前特意到中国台湾参加研讨会，包括剧本围读、服装试装、学画画和潜水，以及了解剧中重要取景地“高雄义守大学”的相关背景。不仅如此，Aokbab还学了两年多的中文，以打破语言障碍，完美呈现“姚可珣”这个人物，不辜负制作方的信任。 Aokbab坦言，这次出演《对你心动的预言》对她来说是一次突破，尤其是台词有95%都是中文，难度很高，所以她做了很多功课。而角色不得不在残酷的命运与无法放手的爱情之间做出选择的设定，让她在读剧本时就深受触动，甚至哭了出来。Aokbab表示，能和优秀的导演及演员团队合作，让她愿意全力以赴把这个角色演绎到最好，她也拜托泰国的粉丝们为她加油，一起期待这部穿越时空的爱情故事。 （编译：KA；来源：9entertain） The post 潜心学习中文超2年，泰女星Aokbab首演中国剧女主 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: 春武里豪宅30名印度籍人员涉非法交易被控 月流水达3000万泰铢
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月20日，春武里移民局在芭提雅地区开展了突击行动，在一处高档住宅内发现印度籍人员30人，其涉嫌非法从事股票及加密货币交易业务。警方表示，该据点未取得相关许可经营，且资金流转规模高达每月3000万泰铢，案件目前仍在进一步调查中。 据介绍，警方此前已接获线索，称春武里Bang Lamun县Nong Prue分区一处住宅内聚集了大量外籍人员，疑似从事违法活动。执法人员随即展开超过2周的跟踪监控，确认存在非法工作行为后，于当日制定行动方案。 行动中，警方人员乔装成电工进入住宅，以检修名义接近目标，在时机成熟后立即表明身份并实施搜查。现场共发现印度籍人员30人，其中19人正在一楼使用笔记本电脑工作，另有11人在二楼休息。一名40岁印度籍男子萨迪普自称为该团伙负责人。 警方在现场查获笔记本电脑22台、手机49部及多本收支账册。经初步核查，大部分人员以旅游签证自2026年3月入境泰国。 据萨迪普供述，其受雇管理上述人员，员工月薪为15000至20000泰铢，主要从事印度市场股票及加密货币交易，并负责客户开发与后台运营。他还称，该团队此前设在迪拜，因战争因素转移至芭提雅继续运作。 不过警方表示，暂不采信上述说法，目前正对电脑数据及资金往来进行深入核查，以判断该团伙是否从事真实交易业务，或涉嫌以投资为名实施诈骗。根据现场账册显示，其资金流转规模已达到每月3000万泰铢。 目前，警

items.title: 亚洲最富20大家族财富增幅创纪录 泰国3大家族跻身榜单前20
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月20日，据泰媒报道，彭博社发布“2026年亚洲20大富豪家族”榜单。2026年亚洲最富有的前20大家族总财富同比增长16%，升至6470亿美元（约合20万亿泰铢），不仅创历史新高，也是自彭博亿万富豪指数于2019年开始编制相关名单以来的最大年度增幅。 尽管全球股市进入调整阶段，叠加中东地区冲突冲击资本市场与全球经济，但这些亚洲富豪家族的财富仍显著上升。从韩国的三星到印度的信实工业，相关家族受益于芯片、金属与基础设施需求上升；而中国香港方面则受房地产市场回暖支撑，推动整体财富再创新高。 尽管关于人工智能泡沫的担忧不断升温，但围绕AI的资本仍快速增长。相关家族并非通过直接开发AI获利，而是提供被视为核心基础设施的要素，如金属、芯片与基础设施，反映AI热潮不仅创造新财富，也在抬升既有财富。受益最明显的是中国的张氏家族，其所控制的中国宏桥集团有限公司被称为铝业之王。过去一年，该公司股价上涨接近200%，背景是投资者转向配置铝这一关键材料，因其对服务器、数据中心与高耗能AI系统投资，以及电动汽车与可再生能源设备制造的重要性上升。 新加坡IMD商学院教授玛琳·迪勒曼表示，目前多国政府更趋向民族主义，倾向于将数据中心与制造能力布局在本国境内，这使得相关家族处于更有利位置。 2026年共有3个来自泰国的家族进入“亚洲20大富豪家族”榜单，分别为排名第4位的谢氏家族、第7位的许

items.title: 油价冲击叠加淡季弱需求 泰国国际航空5月取消46班次航班
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月20日，据泰媒报道，受中东地区冲突引发的能源紧张影响，航空燃油成本上升，旅游淡季阶段旅客出行需求趋缓。泰国国际航空有限公司（大众）已向机票代理商通报，将在2026年5月对航班计划作出调整，包括取消部分航班并下调部分航线航班频次，涉及泰国国内与国际（亚洲、欧洲）航线，合计取消航班46班次。航空公司表示，已为代理商与旅客准备相应替代方案，以便利国内航线旅客出行安排。 国内航线包括： 1.TG002：曼谷—乌隆他尼 取消航班：2026年5月1日至5月31日； 2.TG003：乌隆他尼—曼谷 取消航班：2026年5月1日至5月31日； 3.TG020：曼谷—乌汶 取消航班：2026年5月5日至5月28日（每周二、周四）； 4.TG021：乌汶—曼谷 取消航班：2026年5月5日至5月28日（每周二、周四）； 5.TG040：曼谷—孔敬 取消航班：2026年5月1日至5月31日； 6.TG041：孔敬—曼谷 取消航班：2026年5月1日至5月31日； 国际航线包括： 1.TG329：曼谷—海得拉巴 取消航班：2026年5月4日至5月27日（每周一、周三）； 2.TG330：海得拉巴—曼谷 取消航班：2026年5月5日至5月28日（每周二、周四）； 3.TG335：曼谷—新德里 取消航班：2026年5月1日至5月29日（每周五）； 4.TG336：新德里—曼谷 取消航班：

items.title: 断臂新生——中俄医者的生命接力
items.desc: 莫斯科时间3月20日下午，世界首例淋巴系统重建异体高位上肢移植手术在俄罗斯国家急救中心完成，中国广西中医药大学第二附属医院任晓平教授专家团队联合俄方医疗团队，成功为一名上肢残缺患者移植了右侧上肢。 这场手术之所以被称为“世界首例”，据任晓平教授介绍，关键在于重建了淋巴回流通道，挑战点在于淋巴管极其细微，需在放大60倍的显微镜下操作，任何微小震动都会影响手术。若不重建淋巴系统，淋巴液无法回流将导致肢体严重水肿，而免疫排斥风险也使这类手术难度极高。 在当天长达八小时的手术中，每一环节都极为惊险，对医生的技术、耐力和意志力都是巨大考验。任晓平教授强调，手术需要像下棋一样精密配合，供体与受体组织在解剖、配型、结构、长短、大小和设计上都必须实现无缝对接。除了攻克前所未有的技术难题，中俄团队依靠长期合作积累的信任与默契，通过眼神和手势便能高效协作，例如在放大60倍的显微镜下完成淋巴管吻合后，俄方专家当场表示赞赏。术后首日，移植肢体血液循环正常且未出现预期的严重肿胀，标志着这项世界首例手术取得成功。 手术的成功，是新征程的起点。接下来，患者还将面临终身的抗排异治疗和以毫米为单位的漫长神经再生。一次生命的托举，一场八小时的攻坚，一支中俄并肩的队伍。中俄两国医者凭借专业与真诚共同书写了一段跨越国界的动人故事。这盏在莫斯科点亮的手术灯，照亮的不仅是一个患者的新生，更是人类在面对共同健康挑战时，通过携手
